summary: Verified pom-packing fix, stratification, woodland cheer overlay, and the new 400-flow (glow + parade + celebration card + Not-yet CTA + Place-on-Shelf + persistence). All 8 requested checks pass.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js goal effect depends only on poms.length; fine for this design but if poms could be reduced (e.g., undo), jarFull wouldn't reset. Not an issue for current flow.
Reward is cleared on shelving; consider preserving after shelving so user can plan the next reward if desired (product decision).
Category detection via getComputedStyle backgroundImage requires gradient stops with rgb() — used successfully in tests; no code change needed.
seed_data_creation: Ephemeral localStorage seeding via page.evaluate for pomjar_poms and pomjar_reward; cleaned between test sections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 review checks passed. Detailed results: (1) 68 poms rendered; lowest bottom within 13px of jar bottom (padding 3 + border). Rows tightly packed at y=550,560,580,600 (gaps <=20px). (2) Stratification correct — avg Y: momentum=584, consistency=558, joy=550 (momentum lowest, joy highest). (3) Completing a task increments jar-progress by 1 and adds one pom. (4) Woodland cheer overlay observed within 30 iterations; full-viewport width 1440==window.innerWidth. (5) Seeding 399 + completing 1 task triggers pj-jar-glow, woodland parade, and after ~1.6s the celebration-card with correct reward 'Bookstore & coffee date' plus both buttons. (6) not-yet-button closes card, keeps 400/400, keeps glow, shows shelf-jar-cta which reopens the card. (7) place-on-shelf-button resets jar to 0/400, clears reward, removes glow, creates shelf-jar entry with 'Jul 2026' month-year label and reward text. (8) Reload preserves shelf via localStorage pomjar_shelf. No bugs found.
rca of the issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration.
